overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through Night City. The player walks along wet streets with neon reflections, passing futuristic vehicles and large digital billboards including Delamain and Cirrus advertisements, ending with a view of the character's feet looking down at damaged pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street with neon advertising

events.description: large DELAMAIN billboard becomes visible on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing the rainy street and neon reflections

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking past the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'DELAMAIN' text and corporate logo
elevated highway or transit structure spanning across the street
tall pole with glowing green digital display showing transit information
tropical tree with textured trunk on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. The player walks along the sidewalk as a large DELAMAIN billboard comes into view on the left, while a pedestrian in white passes by on the right. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with an overhead highway structure and digital transit poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with heavy neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: exiting covered street section into more open intersection area with increased traffic
large CIRRUS billboard becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles

entered.detail: large red and white billboard displaying 'CIRRUS' and 'FEEL FREE' text with vehicle advertisement
zebra crossing with glowing red and white stripes on the wet asphalt
yellow and black striped metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wider intersection area where the CIRRUS billboard dominates the left side. The street opens up to reveal more traffic and glowing crosswalk markings on the wet pavement. The DELAMAIN billboard falls behind as the player moves forward past traffic barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: street curb with active traffic lane and parked vehicles

events.description: stopping at the curb to observe passing traffic
white delivery van drives past closely followed by other futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: standing at the curb watching futuristic vehicles drive through the rain-slicked streets

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving past the curb with brake lights illuminated
black sports car waiting in traffic with red taillights glowing

entered.detail: short black and yellow post marking the curb edge
metal railing running along the sidewalk edge with reflective strips

segments.scene_description: The player stops at the street curb to observe the flow of traffic. A white van and several futuristic cars drive past on the wet road, their lights reflecting in the puddles. The CIRRUS billboard is now behind as the player focuses on the immediate street level activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: street curb with damaged pavement and water puddles

events.description: camera tilts down to look at the damaged pavement and character's feet
character's feet become visible in the frame standing at the curb edge

agents.ego_description: looking down at the damaged wet pavement and puddles near the curb, revealing the character's boots

entered.detail: broken asphalt with large potholes filled with rainwater reflecting neon lights
first-person view of character's boots standing at the yellow curb line

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts downward to focus on the damaged street pavement, revealing large potholes filled with rainwater that mirror the neon lights above. The character's boots become visible at the curb's edge, emphasizing the first-person perspective. The view remains focused on the wet, broken asphalt as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy urban corridor that shifts from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit intersection before focusing on the gritty details of the ground. It begins on a wet asphalt street where the camera passes a pedestrian and a large Delamain billboard under the shadow of an overhead highway. As the player moves forward, the scene opens into a broader intersection dominated by a glowing Cirrus billboard and illuminated crosswalk markings. The camera then pauses at the curb to observe futuristic cars and a white van gliding through puddles, their lights shimmering on the road. Finally, the perspective tilts downward, shifting focus from the towering digital displays to the character's boots and the rainwater-filled potholes of the damaged pavement.
